MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Weinmann appeared by zoom for John Phillips (petitioner).
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Don Phillips, Lana Phillips, Dajuan Phillips (heirs).

The court stated that there is a notice issue to James Phillips, Jr. Mrs. Weinmann stated that they filed a waiver of notice last week. Mrs. Rahim stated that she agrees with the tentative ruling and that she is ready for the court's disposition of this. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Weinmann, via Zoom, for John D. Phillips, Personal Representative; Evan Winet, via Zoom, for Don, Lana, and Dajuan Phillips, Objectors.

The court acknowledges the filing of the report regarding the additional heirs confirms with Ms. Weinmann that her client agrees that each additional heir is entitled to 20% as stated in the joint status report. Mr. Winet reconfirms his client's agreement to the above. The court confirms with Ms. Weinmann that she can have a petition for final distribution filed soon.

The court takes the Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution under submission. The Status of Accounting is continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Weinmann, via Zoom, for John Douglass Phillips, Administrator; Azita Rahim, via Zoom, for Don Phillips, Lana Phillips Lewis, and Dajuan Phillips, Claimants.

The court confirms that the parties have yet to meet and confer. The court encourages the parties to meet and confer and points to the Administrator's now, out-of-date report. Ms. Weinman advises that she attempted to meet and confer with Claimants who refused to do so. Ms. Rahim refutes Ms. Weinman's report and advises that her clients are willing to discuss resolution. The court advises that it is inclined to continue this matter to allow the parties to discuss resolution. Ms. Rahim advises of her intent to file a brief status report regarding settlement discussions prior to the next calling of the case. The court accepts Ms. Rahim's suggestion and requests that the report be filed one week prior to the next calling of the case.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
